Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(compat): add postcss-preset-env for Chromium 83 compatibility

Dlubal desktop app uses Qt 5.15.2 with Chromium 83 which doesn't
support @layer, oklch(), CSS nesting, or dvh units. Added
postcss-preset-env (stage 0, Chrome >= 83) to transpile:
- @layer → specificity rewrite (cascade-layers polyfill)
- oklch() → rgb() hex values
- CSS nesting → flattened selectors
- color-mix() → @supports progressive enhancement with hex fallback
- dvh → vh fallback via @supports not

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix(mac): scarica modelli AI prima di avviare Qt al primo avvio

Su macOS, il caricamento di torch/transformers dentro il processo Qt
causava "Segmentation fault: 11" al primo avvio (modelli non presenti).
Il launcher ora controlla se i modelli sono in cache e, se mancano,
esegue --download-models in un processo separato senza Qt prima di
lanciare l'app normalmente.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

infra: clean up stale dev/* branches from completed and superseded failed tasks

Add immediate remote branch deletion to _merge.sh after successful
merge+push. Previously, remote dev/* branches from completed tasks
lingered for 3-7 days until the watchdog's age-based cleanup caught
them, because db_complete_task overwrites the branch name to "merged
to main" (making DB-based cleanup unable to find them).

Also reduce the watchdog's merged-branch cleanup cutoff from 7 days
to 1 day as a tighter fallback for any missed remote deletions.

commit.message:
feat: armazenamento e exibição de mídia no chat do operador

Salva imagens, áudios, vídeos e documentos recebidos do WhatsApp em disco
e serve via endpoint autenticado, permitindo que operadores vejam a mídia
real no chat ao invés de apenas texto descritivo.

- Migration 042: colunas midia_url, midia_mime_type, midia_nome_arquivo, midia_tamanho_bytes
- Serviço media-storage.js: salva buffer em /app/uploads/{empresa}/{YYYY-MM}/{uuid}.ext
- Endpoint GET /api/media/:empresaId/:yearMonth/:filename com JWT (header ou query param)
- media-handler.js: buildGeminiParts() retorna mediaBuffer/mediaMimeType/mediaFileName
- whatsapp.js: salva mídia + inclui campos nos INSERTs e WebSocket emits
- conversas.js: SELECT inclui tipo_mensagem e campos de mídia
- Dockerfile: mkdir /app/uploads

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

infra: trigger mission DONE state transition and write completion summary

Three changes to make mission completion reliable end-to-end:

1. State machine (mission-state.sh): Add active→complete as a valid
   direct transition. Previously only reviewing→complete was valid,
   causing audit warnings when project-driver detected all criteria met.

2. Project-driver: Write completion summary immediately on transition
   to complete, rather than waiting for watchdog's next cycle. Falls
   back gracefully — watchdog still writes summary as backup.

3. API handler (mission-state.ts): Create sentinel file when state is
   set to COMPLETE via API, ensuring watchdog detects the transition
   and writes the completion summary on its next cycle.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Settlement x-axis now uses actual match dates (via source_fixture_id → matches join)
instead of backfill timestamps. Adds $PRICE/INDEX y-axis toggle and 1W/1M/3M/6M/SEASON
timeframe filter with flat-line fallback when no data in range.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Harden normalizer: fix regressions, add cross-field safety, optimize

- Fix ASCII hyphen range rule destroying CAS numbers and subtraction
- Fix tilde swallowing adjacent characters (T~300K)
- Add wt%/vol%/at%/mol% compound percentage expansion
- Add chemical formula lookup table (H2O, CO2, NaCl, etc.)
- Add journal abbreviation period stripping (Nat., Phys., Rev., etc.)
- Add unit separator: slash to "per" between known unit words only
- Add bra-ket notation handling (angle brackets + pipe inside)
- Add arc-minute/second in DMS context before ASCII conversion
- Add uppercase X to scientific notation regex
- Add trailing space to superscript expansion (electron configs)
- Remove ambiguous au from SI (arbitrary vs astronomical units)
- Remove single-letter m/s/g/A/N from SI (false positives)
- Fix citation regex: require multi-ref pattern, preserve sqlite3 etc.
- Fix 2 failing fallback tests: add SPEAK11_MUTE_CHECKED=1
- Add cross-field robustness tests (paths, pipes, tech terms, CAS)
- Optimize: compiled alternation regexes for SI, chem, abbreviations
- 824 tests pass, 0 failures

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
simplify coverage reporting to no-features vs has-features

The component breakdown table now shows "No Features" / "Has Features"
instead of none/partial/decomposed. Since the default query excludes
closed RFEs, decomposed never appears separately and grouping it with
partial gives more actionable signal.
